description_long: This rifle features a futuristic design with a robust, metallic body and a prominent drum magazine located beneath the main receiver. The stock is angular and ergonomic, finished in a brown color that contrasts with the otherwise dark and metallic gray body. Accents of cyan blue are visible along the top rail and on the drum magazine, suggesting advanced technology or energy-based components. The barrel is short and compact, with a wide muzzle and no visible muzzle device. The grip is shaped for comfort and control, and the top of the rifle includes a raised section that may house an integrated sighting system. The overall construction appears solid and durable, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A futuristic, metallic rifle with a drum magazine, brown ergonomic stock, and cyan blue accents, featuring a compact barrel and integrated sighting system.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the drum magazine, brown stock, and cyan blue accents.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide muzzle, compact barrel, and the symmetry of the rifle's design.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum magazine, ergonomic grip, and the angular stock.
description_view_3: Top-down view revealing the cyan blue detailing along the top rail and the overall width of the rifle.
